description: Benchmark tests for arch-update skill - Architecture document creation, update, and validation

baseline_comparison.description: Manually checking code changes and updating architecture docs by hand

evals.name: new-file-detection
evals.prompt: Detect which new source files have been added to the project that require architecture documentation updates

assertions.name: detects_new_source_files
assertions.description: Should detect all newly added source files

assertions.name: identifies_undocumented_files
assertions.description: Should identify files lacking architecture documentation

assertions.name: suggests_doc_location
assertions.description: Should suggest appropriate documentation location

assertions.name: lists_affected_layers
assertions.description: Should identify which architecture layer the new files belong to

evals.name: layer-classification
evals.prompt: Classify the following files into the correct architecture layer: project root ARCHITECTURE.md, module-level auth.arch.md, and component-level UserRepository.arch.md

assertions.name: classifies_l0_correctly
assertions.description: ARCHITECTURE.md at root should be classified as L0 (project level)

assertions.name: classifies_l1_correctly
assertions.description: Module-level arch.md should be classified as L1

assertions.name: classifies_l2_correctly
assertions.description: Component-level arch.md should be classified as L2

assertions.name: explains_layer_hierarchy
assertions.description: Should explain the L0/L1/L2 hierarchy relationship

evals.name: doc-generation
evals.prompt: Generate an architecture document for the newly added payment service module based on code analysis of src/services/payment/

assertions.name: generates_valid_markdown
assertions.description: Generated doc should be valid markdown with proper headings

assertions.name: includes_module_overview
assertions.description: Should include an overview section describing the payment module

assertions.name: lists_components
assertions.description: Should list the key components found in the module

assertions.name: includes_code_pointers
assertions.description: Should include code file references/pointers

assertions.name: correct_naming_convention
assertions.description: Generated file should follow naming convention (*.arch.md)

evals.name: sync-validation
evals.prompt: Validate that the existing architecture documentation is in sync with the current codebase. Check src/auth/ against docs/auth.arch.md

assertions.name: detects_undocumented_component
assertions.description: Should detect OAuthProvider.ts is not documented in arch doc

assertions.name: reports_sync_status
assertions.description: Should report overall sync status (in-sync / out-of-sync)

assertions.name: lists_discrepancies
assertions.description: Should list specific discrepancies found

assertions.name: suggests_remediation
assertions.description: Should suggest how to fix the sync issues

evals.name: incremental-update
evals.prompt: Update the existing src/auth/auth.arch.md to include the newly added OAuthProvider component without regenerating the entire document

assertions.name: adds_new_component_only
assertions.description: Should add OAuthProvider section without rewriting existing content

assertions.name: preserves_existing_content
assertions.description: Should preserve existing AuthService, JwtProvider, UserRepository sections

assertions.name: indicates_incremental_mode
assertions.description: Should indicate this is an incremental update, not a full regeneration

assertions.name: updates_table_of_contents
assertions.description: Should update any table of contents or component list
